text: Which one of the routine test and inspection of LSA is not required by regulations:

options.text: Lifeboat engine should be run for atleast 3 mins every week
General emergency alarm to be tested daily
Survival craft and Rescue boats with launching appliances shall be visually inspected weekly
Inspection of Lifeboat equipments shall be carried out monthly

explanation: The general emergency alarm is tested during fire and abandon ship drills, which are required to be held at least once a month, not daily. Other options represent standard weekly or monthly maintenance routines under SOLAS LSA Code requirements.
